# This file is automatically generated by Craft.
# Do not edit manually, changes will be overwritten.
# For additional custom CMake use CMakeLists.extra.cmake instead.

cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.14)
project(craft)

set(CMAKE_C_STANDARD 99)

file(GLOB_RECURSE SOURCES "src/*.c")

file(GLOB ROOT_SOURCES "./*.c")
list(APPEND SOURCES ${ROOT_SOURCES})

add_executable(craft ${SOURCES})

target_include_directories(craft PRIVATE . include)

if(EXISTS ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/CMakeLists.extra.cmake)
    include(${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/CMakeLists.extra.cmake)
endif()
